This whole series needs to be rebased to the latest master to get the fix for LU-6937
Uploaded patch set 4.

Patch Set 4:

Andreas, problem with that is all the conflicts that will be introduced by James Simmons' changes. These are going to be extensive and I don't want to deal with conflicts at the moment. It will eventually get done, though.

In the meantime, is there a good way to just pull in that fix so we don't keep failing regression?  Ideally, I would pull in  the fix temporarily and then take it out when we fastforward the multi-rail branch.

One way I guess is to put the patch for the regression failure fix, before all the multi-rail patches. Rebase the multi-rail patches on top of that. Then when we fastforward later on, we just discard this patch.

Is there a better way? thanks
Uploaded patch set 5.

parents.subject: LU-7734 lnet: rename LND peer to peer_ni

commit.subject: LU-7734 lnet: Add peer_ni and NI stats for DLC
commit.message:
LU-7734 lnet: Add peer_ni and NI stats for DLC

This patch adds three stats to the peer_ni and NI structures:
send_count, recv_count, and drop_count. These stats get printed
when you do an "lnetctl net show -v" (for NI) and
"lnetctl peer show" (for peer_ni).

Signed-off-by: Doug Oucharek <doug.s.oucharek@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ic41c88cbc68dba677151d87a1fab53a48d36ea29
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/20170
Reviewed-by: Amir Shehata <amir.shehata@intel.com>
Tested-by: Amir Shehata <amir.shehata@intel.com>
